The Network

Hot Rodder Directory

A free map of locally-owned businesses — flower shops to fabricators. Keep money local, and connect with petrol people who’d never have crossed paths otherwise.

  • Directory is live. Listings are open.
  • Browse the map. Find a shop. Add your business.
  • Free to list, always.

What's Happening

Event Calendar

Car shows, swap meets, builds, meetups. Past events ghost out at the top. Scroll up to see history. Have an event? Submit it.

SUBMIT AN EVENT: Events are free to submit and reviewed by an admin within 24 hours before they post.

JPG/PNG flyer, max 10MB | Date, time, location, description required

Signed in. Submit your event for review.

Submitted events are not auto-posted. Wolf reviews within 24 hrs.

Who We Are

Built For The Pack

Hot rod culture doesn’t belong to shops and fabricators alone. It belongs to everyone who wrenches, builds, and breathes this stuff — including the ones running flower shops, barbershops, and bakeries.

01

The Apparel

Shirts, stickers, goods. Every dollar funds the next step — the website, the data, the lights.

02

The Tool Line

Honest tools worth owning. Still figuring out what’s actually worth building. No rush — good stuff takes time.

03

The Shop Space

The one that matters: a real space. Youth & adult workshops, summer camps, guided practice for anyone who wants to build with their hands.

“Keeping kulture going strong. So the youth will be ready when it’s time to pass the keys.”
— WOLF

JOIN THE PACK

Create a free Wolf's Garage account to upload photos, register your business, post to the bulletin board, and submit events. No spam. Listings are reviewed before going live.

Optional. Leave blank to show your email on posts and comments.

Heads up: All new accounts are auto-added to the Wolf's Garage mailing list for swag discounts, event updates, and inside scoops. Don't want them? Unsubscribe anytime from any email, one click, no hassle.
